data.title: Tesla Investor Ross Gerber Calls It 'Game Over' As Google's Waymo Expands Robotaxi Presence In West LA
data.description: Ross Gerber, CEO of Gerber Kawasaki Wealth and a prominent investor in Tesla Inc., recently shared his thoughts on X regarding the competitive landscape in autonomous driving, specifically highlighting Alphabet Inc. subsidiary Google's Waymo.

data.title: Dow, S&P 500 Settle At Record High Levels, Record 6th Consecutive Week Of Gains: Fear Index Moves To 'Extreme Greed' Zone
Tesla Dojo Fabric Lead Leaves Company Amid Major Talent Upheaval At EV Giant
data.description: Eric Quinnell, senior staff engineer at Tesla, who was working on the company's Dojo supercomputer project, said on Friday that he is leaving the EV giant.

data.title: SAP, Nucor And 3 Stocks To Watch Heading Into Monday
Quiet Bitcoin Whales, Sitting On A Windfall, Spring Back To Activity — Price Retrace Imminent?
data.description: Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) investors were suddenly waking up after years of dormancy to move around their stash as the leading cryptocurrency gathers upward momentum toward all-time highs.
